title: Oreo's Foods
description: In this mod, you can create four dishes: a carrot sandwich, a burger, an omelet, and ramen.
body:
# Details About The Mod
## All Recipes⬇️
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 ## Update:2.0.0  
This version of the  mod adds the following features:
- Removed carrot sandwich and chef block in version 2.0.0
- all others features of version 1.0.0 are still present in the mod
- Tomato 
- Toasted bread slice
- Flour
- dough
- Apple slices
- Club sandwich
- Quesadillas
- Cheese
- Tortilla
- Tacos


## Update:1.0.0
This version of the  mod adds the following features:

- Omelete 
- Burger 
- Carrot Sandwich
- Chef Block
- Ramen
- Bread Slice



  

 

Feel free to find the recipes in the gallery.


**Note: For Fabric mod users, the Villager and Chef Block have been removed**
